_doc: Declared registry of standing processes the loop expects to be running (bdo 2026-06-22, the watchdog ask). loop/health.py checks each: its OS task registered+enabled, and its freshness signal recent. A down process is surfaced at session start so bdo and any session both know. Machine-specific paths are expected here (this is config for bdo's machine); add an entry when a new standing process is stood up.

processes.name: ontum-loop-tick
processes.why: the standing loop tick: advance the pipeline + drain value-confirm reviews every 30 min, committing to loop/auto-tick
